topics.title: Eyewear Styles and Online Chess
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding various eyewear trends, the decline of traditional deli service in New York, and a guest's humorous experience learning chess online.

topics.title: Chess Strategy and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of chess tactics, shares stories about a colleague's unconventional behavior at a party, and discusses rumors regarding a media personality.

topics.title: Comedy Sketches and Script Negotiations
topics.summary: The studio features discussions regarding the production of comedy sketches, the critique of a performer's nudity, and negotiations over script choices for an upcoming film project.

topics.title: Larry King Behavior and Celebrity Interactions
topics.summary: The studio discusses reports of Larry King's erratic behavior, his interactions with guests like Jerry Seinfeld, and various anecdotes regarding celebrity dating and past film sets.

topics.title: Robin Quivers' New Look and Relationship Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses Robin Quivers' new oversized glasses, her recent dating life with Jim Florentine, and a listener's offer to pay staff members to read an upcoming fiction novel.

topics.title: Negotiating Script Readings and Radio Ownership
topics.summary: The studio staff negotiates payment for reading a book, discusses the production of an R-rated comedy script titled "The Golden Life," and explores the complexities of owning versus performing on radio stations.

topics.title: Radio Broadcasting and Industry Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio explores memories of past radio stations, the challenges of top 40 programming, and various humorous incidents involving former colleagues.

topics.title: Radio Industry Anecdotes and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on past radio careers, personal struggles with industry demands, and various stories involving physical altercations and adult encounters.

topics.title: Guest Interaction and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features a guest sharing personal experiences regarding past relationships, her upbringing in Kentucky, and the dynamics of dating while working in show business.

topics.title: Accounting Knowledge and Personal History
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the guest's background in property management accounting, her personal life including two marriages and a son, and an exchange about past interactions with acquaintances.

topics.title: Letitia Kline Interview and Tickle Chair Segment
topics.summary: The studio features Letitia Kline as she discusses her sexual experiences in public places, participates in a tickle chair segment, and promotes her appearance in Maxim magazine.

topics.title: Death of Quiet Riot Singer
topics.summary: The studio discusses the death of rock singer Kevin Dubrow, his history with the band Quiet Riot, and the fact that he lived with his mother to manage debts.

topics.title: Hulk Hogan Divorce and Sean Taylor Shooting
topics.summary: The studio discusses Hulk Hogan's divorce proceedings, the shooting of NFL player Sean Taylor, and a proposed "Tobby Tax" for obese air travelers.

topics.title: Current Events and Survivalist Culture
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including a senator's upcoming book, an international incident involving a teacher in Sudan, NFL broadcasting disputes, the disappearance of adventurer Steve Fawcett, and various survivalist television programs.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers topics ranging from action film budgets and a German police investigation into a dog with a swastika to Middle East peace talks, the health of Vice President Dick Cheney, and various celebrity updates regarding Dancing with the Stars and Bob Dylan.
